summary: Syroce B2B API infrastructure testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 23/23 tests passed. Frontend: All B2B API Key UI elements working correctly.
features_tested: B2B API Key Creation: POST /api/b2b/api-keys?agency_id=... - PASSED
B2B API Key Info: GET /api/b2b/api-keys/{agency_id} - PASSED
B2B API Key Regenerate: POST /api/b2b/api-keys/{agency_id}/regenerate - PASSED
B2B API Key Revoke: DELETE /api/b2b/api-keys/{agency_id} - PASSED
B2B Create Reservation: POST /api/b2b/reservations (X-API-Key auth) - PASSED
B2B List Reservations: GET /api/b2b/reservations (X-API-Key auth) - PASSED
B2B Get Reservation: GET /api/b2b/reservations/{id} (X-API-Key auth) - PASSED
B2B Cancel Reservation: PUT /api/b2b/reservations/{id}/cancel (X-API-Key auth) - PASSED
Push providers endpoint shows Syroce B2B: GET /api/channel-manager/unified-rate-manager/push-providers - PASSED
Frontend: Agency Management page shows B2B API Key section when agency expanded - PASSED
Frontend: API Key Create button works - PASSED
Frontend: API Key display shows generated key with Copy button - PASSED
Frontend: Regenerate and Revoke buttons visible for agencies with keys - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: B2B API router properly registered in router_registry.py
API key authentication uses X-API-Key header with SHA256 hashing
Admin endpoints properly protected with _require_hotel_staff check
API key prefix (syroce_b2b_) helps identify key type
Reservation confirmation codes prefixed with B2B- for easy identification
Push providers endpoint correctly includes Syroce B2B when active agencies exist
Frontend AgencyManagement.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_B2B_Revoke agency for revoke testing, created B2B reservation for reservation flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Syroce B2B API fully implemented and tested. All admin API key management endpoints work (create, get, regenerate, revoke). All B2B agency endpoints work with X-API-Key authentication (content, availability, rates, reservations CRUD). Frontend Agency Management page shows B2B API Key section with create/regenerate/revoke/copy functionality. Push providers endpoint includes Syroce B2B when active agencies exist.
